items.title: Names Townsend
items.text: Pete Townsend, the legendary guitarist of The Who, walked down the street
items.note: Theme tokens around Townsend, guitar, and The Who are visible in early and middle layers.

items.title: Names Fey
items.text: Tina Fey hosted the awards ceremony alongside her longtime collaborator
items.note: Award and ceremony tokens appear near the celebrity-name context.

items.title: Names Nicole
items.text: Nicole Kidman accepted the award and thanked her family and friends
items.note: Award, acceptance, and family-related tokens appear in the event template.

items.title: Morph Ible
items.text: The proposal was perfectly feasible, entirely sensible, and quite reasonable
items.note: Adjective and adverb patterns are visible, but token names are less cleanly semantic.

items.title: Place Street
items.text: The cafe is located on Baker Street, just around the corner from the avenue
items.note: Street and place-related names are the clearest local correspondence.

items.title: Self Intro
items.text: my name is Bryan, I am a huge fan of yours. I was always very impressed with you
items.note: Name, first-person, and fan-template words appear in shallow layers.
